title: Daywing
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Species |image= |name=Daywing |designation= |class=[[Insect/Legends|Insect]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Ruby]] and sapphire |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan=Less than a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|I've never seen colors like it.''"
"''They hatch and take flight for a day, and they die by the evening, a brief and glorious…''"
"''…They're amazing.|[[Darman Skirata|RC-1136]] and [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]|}} '''Daywings''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insect/Legends|insect]] found on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. Notable for their extremely short lifespan, daywings [[Reproduction/Legends|hatched]] in the morning and died by the evening. The [[Color/Legends|ruby]]– and sapphire–colored insects were found on the [[Braan River]] and other small standing bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]] on Qiilura in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', which includes the appearance of daywings, in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. ==Behind the scenes== Daywings appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tagesflügler }} [[Category:Creatures of Qiilura]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Insects]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
